positive: Stylized celestial sloth hanging peacefully on a crescent moon branch, surrounded by bioluminescent flora and cosmic nebulae. The sloth has a relaxed, calm posture and subtle starry fur texture. The scene utilizes a high-contrast, deep indigo and sapphire palette accented with glowing emerald and gold accents. Focus on clean, distinct silhouettes and crisp outlines for optimal textile printing. Composition is centralized, with the sloth positioned slightly above the horizontal center. Style: Detailed vector illustration meets modern cosmic linework, evoking a whimsical, peaceful, and slightly mysterious nocturnal mood. Use soft, atmospheric depth with defined edges.
negative: blurry, poorly rendered, low detail, text, watermark, signature, messy, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, photorealistic, logos, trademarks
